headline: Chewy: CEO's Warnings Are Justified, But The Stock Is Now Too Cheap To Ignore (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Chewy (CHWY) upgraded to Strong Buy: strong fundamentals, Autoship growth, $562M FCF, buyback boost and upside vs. macro risks.
